title: MRVL Q4 Earnings Preview: What To Watch For
text: Marvell Technology reported strong fourth-quarter fiscal 2022 results, with non-GAAP earnings of 50 cents per share beating the consensus mark of 48 cents per share, and revenues of $1.34 billion, which outpaced the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $1.32 billion. The company reported non-GAAP earnings of $1.57 per share for the full fiscal 2022, witnessing an increase of 70.7%, while reporting full-year revenues of $4.46 billion, indicating a surge of 50.3% year over year. The top line increased 68% from the year-earlier quarter, with this upsurge primarily attributed to substantial growth in all the end markets, particularly the data center end market. For the first quarter of fiscal 2023, Marvell expected strong revenue growth driven by the data-center end market, accelerated 5G adoptions in the United States and other regions, and broad growth across multiple products, with the company projecting fiscal first-quarter revenues of $1.425 billion (plus or minus 3%).
